source_note: Catalogue rows should point to primary sources: original papers, official code repositories, official project pages, and official weight/model pages where available.
notes: Catalogue includes explicit modelling_paradigm_key and modelling_paradigm fields used by the Landscape marker shapes.

landscape_default_fields.note: Default landscape uses explicit curated plotting fields rather than inferred tag counts.

latest_update: Added upstream-derived benchmark/dataset tab and push-trigger bootstrap run.
description: An upstream-derived living catalogue of Earth observation foundation models, benchmarks, datasets, and related resources.
positioning: Curated living companion resource for EO foundation model surveys.
source: Public catalogue uses curated seed entries plus only high-confidence LLM-enriched upstream additions. Low-confidence upstream candidates remain in data/candidates/ for curator review.
review_note: Raw upstream candidates are not published unless they have a real model name and non-low-confidence structured extraction.
benchmark_dataset_source: Generated from upstream benchmark, dataset, pre-training dataset, and embedding-data sections.
benchmark_dataset_tab: data/benchmarks.json is generated from upstream benchmark, dataset, pre-training-dataset, and embedding-data sections.
